# Pathway Academy Zone

> Pathway Academy Zone is a registered Alternative Provision (AP) in Stoke-on-Trent and Staffordshire, UK, supporting young people aged 11-16 (KS3 & KS4) with SEMH needs, behaviour difficulties, disengagement, and reintegration journeys. We work with secondary schools, academies, Multi-Academy Trusts and Local Authorities to deliver structured, safe and supportive learning that improves behaviour, attendance and outcomes.

## Positioning

Alternative Education Provider | Alternative Provision (AP) | KS3 & KS4 Specialist Provision | Behaviour, Engagement & Reintegration | Stoke-on-Trent | Staffordshire

## Who we support

- Students aged 11-16 (KS3 & KS4)
- At risk of exclusion or permanently excluded pupils
- Students with behavioural, emotional or social challenges (SEMH)
- Young people with low attendance or disengagement from school
- Learners requiring a more personalised and structured approach

## What we do

- Deliver alternative provision programmes for schools and Local Authorities
- Re-engage learners through personalised curriculum pathways
- Improve behaviour, attendance and engagement
- Support reintegration into mainstream education where appropriate
- Provide life skills, employability and confidence-building programmes
- Work with families, schools and professionals to support outcomes

## Curriculum & offer

- Core subjects (English, Maths, Science and functional skills)
- Vocational learning and practical skills
- Personal development and life skills (PSHE)
- Behaviour and emotional regulation support
- Employability and future pathways preparation

## Outcomes we deliver

- Improved behaviour and engagement
- Increased attendance
- Reintegration into mainstream education where appropriate
- Clear progression into education, training or employment
- Increased confidence, structure and routine

## Geography

Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Newcastle-under-Lyme, Stafford, Crewe and surrounding areas.

## Ideal referrals

- "We have a student at risk of exclusion"
- "We need alternative provision for a KS3 or KS4 learner"
- "We need support with behaviour and engagement"
- "We are looking for a trusted AP provider in Stoke-on-Trent"
- "We need a reintegration pathway for a disengaged pupil"

## Target audiences

Secondary schools, Headteachers, SENCOs, Behaviour Leads, Local Authorities and Commissioners, Multi-Academy Trusts, Social care and youth services, Parents and guardians.

## Keywords

Alternative Provision Stoke-on-Trent, AP Provider Staffordshire, KS3 Alternative Education, KS4 Alternative Provision, Behaviour Support School, Pupil Referral Alternative, School Exclusion Support, Reintegration Programme, Education Support for Disengaged Students, SEND Alternative Provision, PRU Alternative, Education Intervention Provider, Youth Engagement Programme.

## Key resources

- [Home](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/): Overview of services, statistics, programmes.
- [About Us](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/about): Mission, CARES values, leadership philosophy.
- [Programmes](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/programmes): Six core programme strands (KS3, KS4, vocational, SEMH, reintegration, transition).
- [Our Team](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/team): Educators, pastoral specialists, executives.
- [Outcomes](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/outcomes): Attendance, qualifications, destinations data.
- [Centres](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/centres): Stafford and Stoke learning centres.
- [Partners](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/partners): Schools and organisations across Staffordshire.
- [Safeguarding](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/safeguarding): Safeguarding policy, DSL, reporting routes.

## Knowledge Hub

- [Knowledge Hub](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/knowledge-hub): Index of guides, comparisons, best practice.
- [Complete Guide to Alternative Provision](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/knowledge-hub/complete-guide): Definitive 15-minute reference covering AP definition, legal framework, referral triggers, programme models, safeguarding, staffing, common mistakes, and progression.
- [Glossary](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/knowledge-hub/glossary): Definitions of AP, EHCP, SEMH, PRU, SENCO, and other key terms.

## Contact & referrals

- [Contact](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/contact): Phone 01782 365365, email info@pathwayacademyzone.co.uk
- [Make a Referral](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/referral): Referral form for schools, Local Authorities, social workers, and parents.
- [News](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/news): Latest news and announcements.
- [FAQs](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/faqs): Frequently asked questions.

## Optional

- [Blog](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/blog): Long-form articles.
- [Policies](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/policies): Public-facing policy library.
- [Careers](https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/careers): Open positions and how to apply.

## Call to action

If you are a school, Local Authority, Multi-Academy Trust, or organisation seeking high-quality alternative provision for young people aged 11-16, contact Pathway Academy Zone on 01782 365365 or via https://pathwayacademyzone.co.uk/referral to discuss referrals, placements and partnership opportunities.
